output.sparql:
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?artist WHERE {
  ?song wdt:P1476 "How Can You Mend a Broken Heart" @en .
  ?song p:P175 / ps:P175 ?artist .
}
output.result:
Got 2 rows and 1 column:
| artist     |
| ---------- |
| wd:Q133405 |
| wd:Q133405 |
output.formatted:
Bee Gees

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?artist WHERE {
  ?song wdt:P1476 "How Can You Mend a Broken Heart" @en .
  ?song p:P175 / ps:P175 ?artist .
}
```

Execution result:
Got 2 rows and 1 column:
| artist     |
| ---------- |
| wd:Q133405 |
| wd:Q133405 |

- Explain your thought process before and after each step and function call.
